messages.text: Basket 1: a light tan woven basket shaped like a duck/bird—rounded body with a small head/beak on the right, and a single handle arching over its back.
Done. Go to Basket 2
Basket 2: a deep, rounded bucket-shaped wicker basket with a very dark (almost black) thick arched handle; medium-brown tight weave with a slightly darker band around the top rim.
Done. Go to Basket 3
Basket 3: rectangular picnic basket in light tan wicker with a tall center handle, and a hinged lid that’s flipped open to the RIGHT side.
Done. Go to Basket 4

Basket 4: an oval, boat-shaped wicker basket (one side higher), light tan with distinct white-painted bands/stripes around the body; single arched handle with pale/white wrapping near the top and small reddish tie points near the sides.
Placed. Go to Basket 5
Basket 5: squat rectangular wicker basket with a thick twisted-rope handle arching high; tight checkerboard weave and a darker brown rim band.
Done. Go to Basket 6
Basket 6: the light-tan round lidded basket shaped like a cat—cat face on top (eyes/whiskers) and it sits on little feet.
Done. Go to Basket 7
Basket 7: rectangular basket with one big arched handle; body is dark green/teal weave, with a tan/orange rim and handle, plus a braided trim band along the top front.
Placed. Go to Basket 8
Basket 8: the dark gray/black oval basket with one thick arched handle, and a couple light tan/cream bands around the lower part.
Done. Go to Basket 9
Basket 9: tall round/cylindrical wicker basket (like a wastebasket) with two small loop handles near the top—no big arched handle.
Placed. Go to Basket 10
Basket 10: very shallow, wide round tray-basket with a flat spiral-woven base and one arched handle over the top.
Done. Go to Basket 11
Basket 11: deep round tub/bucket basket with a thick rolled rim and TWO small loop handles on the sides; diagonal/chevron weave pattern (no big arch handle).
Placed. Go to Basket 12
Basket 12: small brown oval basket with one arch handle; open lattice sides, and the rim has a distinctive pointed/peaked section on one side (like a little spout).
Done. Go to Basket 12
